stemHtml: In case of a Radio Altimeter (R/A) failure, is the ability to perform an automatic landing affected?

options.a: No, because the barometric altitude is used.
options.b: No, because the GPS altitude is used.
options.c: Yes, because the R/A is used during the automatic flare.
options.d: Yes, because the R/A is used during the tracking of the glide path.
